name: python3-platformdirs
title: python3-platformdirs
description:
determining appropriate platform-specific directories (Python 3)
Depending on your system (Linux, Mac OS X, or Windows), you have to use
different directories for storing user data. platformdirs will help you choose
an appropriate:
.
* user data directory (user_data_dir function)
* user config directory (user_config_dir function)
* user cache directory (user_cache_dir function)
* site data directory (site_data_dir function)
* site config directory (site_config_dir function)
* user log directory (user_log_dir function)
.
On Linux systems, these function return directories based on the XDG Base
Directory Specification.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-platformdirs because determining appropriate platform-specific directories (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-platformdirs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-platformdirs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-platformdirs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
